# starlight

> A calm, free sleep-sound mixer that runs entirely in the browser. Every one
> of its 19 ambient sounds is synthesized at runtime — procedural DSP, no
> recordings, no streaming, no server. It works fully offline as an
> installable PWA, keeps all data on-device, and has no accounts, ads, or
> tracking.

Important note for agents: this is a client-side React application — fetching
the HTML yields an empty shell. This file and the JSON-LD in the page head are
the reliable machine-readable descriptions.

## What it does

- **Library**: 19 generated sounds across Water / Fire / Air / Wildlife /
  Cozy / Earth / Noise / Urban — rain, fire, fan, birdsong, night insects,
  thunder, windy forest, ocean, wind, underwater, white/pink/brown noise,
  train, airplane, heartbeat (including a womb setting), cat purr, wind
  chimes, ticking clock.
- **Mixing**: layer any sounds with per-sound volume; masking-aware mixing
  keeps stacked layers clear. Each sound has named character presets (e.g.
  ocean: Lapping Shore / Distant Surf / Rolling Waves / Storm Surf) and
  fine-tune sliders.
- **Scenes**: ten curated one-tap mixes.
- **Sleep timer**: 15m–8h with a gentle 90-second wind-down fade.
- **Mixes**: save, reload, and delete custom mixes (stored locally).
- **Arrange**: reorder the sound library itself — hold a card and drag (or
  use the keyboard grip on each card); the arrangement persists on-device.
- **Drift mode**: a full-screen night clock with a screen wake lock.

## Facts

- Free, open source, no sign-up. All audio is generated on-device; the app
  makes no network requests after install (fonts, icons, and audio worklets
  are self-hosted and precached).
- Privacy: no analytics, no tracking, no data leaves the device.
  Details: https://starlight.rest/privacy.html
- Source code: https://github.com/HamzaAnjum96/SleepSounds
- App: https://starlight.rest/

## Key docs (in the repository)

- [README](https://github.com/HamzaAnjum96/SleepSounds/blob/main/README.md):
  features, setup, full changelog.
- [ARCHITECTURE](https://github.com/HamzaAnjum96/SleepSounds/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md):
  the audio engine (Web Audio graph, AudioWorklet generators, procedural WAV
  synthesis, masking model, PWA update flow).
- [DESIGN](https://github.com/HamzaAnjum96/SleepSounds/blob/main/DESIGN.md):
  the visual system.
- [Adding a sound](https://github.com/HamzaAnjum96/SleepSounds/blob/main/docs/ADDING-A-SOUND.md):
  the synthesis rules and contributor checklist.
